features: Eco-friendly and recyclable – These heavy duty black bin bags are made from 100% recycled plastic and are fully recyclable after use. A sustainable rubbish bag solution for home, office, and commercial use.

Heavy-Duty Strength: Designed for durability, these extra-strong sacks can handle heavy garden waste without tearing or puncturing, making them perfect for both household gardens and commercial landscaping.

Generous Packaging: Each pack contains 25 extra-strong garden sacks, each holding up to 80L, with dimensions of 710mm x 820mm, providing an ample supply for your garden waste disposal needs. Ideal for both household and commercial use.
Superior Leak Resistance: With advanced leak-resistant technology, these sacks effectively contain wet or sharp garden waste, preventing spills and ensuring a clean, mess-free disposal experience.
Fully Recyclable: These sacks are 100% recyclable, supporting environmentally responsible disposal and helping reduce your carbon footprint by enabling proper recycling after use.
